TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Roch_Marc_Christian_Kaboré, title = Roch_Marc_Christian_Kaboré, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roch_Marc_Christian_Kaboré} }

S.FORM: Roch Marc Christian Kaboré ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 4, Roch Marc Christian Kaboré, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Burkina faso ta' misuw hya' ga Roch Marc Christian Kaboré, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Roch Marc Christian Kaboré ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 4, Roch Marc Christian Kaboré, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Burkina faso ta' misuw hya' ga Roch Marc Christian Kaboré, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: roʦ~ʨħ marʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian kaβor* rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, roʦ~ʨħ marʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian kaβor*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βurkina *as~ɕo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa roʦ~ʨħ marʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian kaβor*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
